title: Update skill migration hotfix
summary: Forge Update now migrates legacy or local installs to the main Git marketplace package instead of making users fix install shape by hand.
highlights: $forge-update now runs the main-package refresh path for legacy or local installs instead of only printing instructions.
If Codex marketplace upgrade fails, Forge Update falls back to marketplace add against main before giving up.
Update summaries now fetch the latest patch notes feed during migration so users see what changed.
Failed migrations remain non-destructive and print the exact manual command to run.
